Fluid Folding Door

Fluid Folding Door

Elevate your home with folding doors that invite light, air, and a sense of freedom

Folding doors offer the ultimate in flexible living—transforming solid walls into wide, open thresholds that invite light, air, and connection to the outdoors.

With smooth folding operation and precision-engineered components, they create uninterrupted openings that seamlessly expand a space. Whether framing a garden, terrace, or internal courtyard, folding doors deliver clarity, openness, and dynamic movement. When closed, they maintain exceptional thermal and acoustic performance; when open, they effortlessly blur the boundaries between interior and exterior.

Technical Specifications

Precision German engineering with a refined, minimalist aesthetic. With slim 110mm face widths, low thresholds, and largely concealed joints, the Fluid Folding Door delivers a clean, unobtrusive appearance that integrates effortlessly into any architectural setting.

Dimensions

  • Sightlines : 110 mm

  • Max Leaf Weight : 3 kg

  • Max Leaf Height : 3 m

  • Max Leaf Width: 1.2 m

  • Max Glass Thickness : 48 mm

  • Max Leaf Weight : 120 kg

Features

  • Wheel roller for smooth opening

  • Low threshold

  • Up to 14 sashes

  • 90 degree opening corner

Options

  • RAL colours

  • Anodised finishes

  • Wood effect powder coating

Performance

  • Thermal Coefficient Uw : 0,8 W/m² K

  • Sound Insolation : Up to 41 dB

  • Water Tightness : Class E750

  • Air Tightness : Class 4

  • Wind Tightness : Class C3

  • PAS24

Configurations

Our folding door combines function with form, offering a contemporary glazing solution that adapts to the unique character of each project. Available in a range of finishes, colours, and configurations, it provides design freedom without compromising on detail.

With unlimited opening configurations, the system offers exceptional versatility—allowing almost any design concept to be realised with precision and ease.

Seamless, Flush Thresholds Without Compromising Weather Protection

Threshold

Featuring a fully weathered flush bottom track, creating seamless floor levels between inside and out while eliminating trip hazards. Unlike traditional rebated thresholds, this solution avoids unsightly step-ups, offering full weather protection without compromising design. For internal transitions—such as between a main house and conservatory—a non-weathered low threshold option is also available allowing flush floor levels by recessing the track into the floor.

Smartly engineered components designed for smooth operation and easy installation.

Details

Combining refined design with efficient manufacturing, the system features a double bearing with gimbal stabiliser for smooth operation, a 45mm thermal break, 48mm glazing capacity, and optional preassembled gaskets for faster installation.

  • 48 mm glazing capacity

  • Faster manufacturing: Possibility of providing preassembled gaskets

  • 45 mm thermal bridge breakage

  • Double bearing system with a gimbal stabiliser
